Toxic Fruit

Triggers: Once in a while

Evil Spores
Infects 3 enemies with a living disease:
- If an infected unit dies within 5 sec, they can't be resurrected for 3 sec.
- All stats of infected units are reduced by 15% for 5 sec.
- Incoming healing of infected units is reduced by 25% for 5 sec.
- Infected units take 200000 magic damage for 5 sec.

Requirements: 90-100
